india_trends.title: Japan’s Nikkei 225 hits record high on US-Iran deal hopes; SoftBank, Seiko Epson lead the rally
india_trends.summary: Japanese stocks surged on May 7, with the Nikkei 225 rising 5.58% to a record high, fueled by optimism over US-Iran negotiations and strong tech earnings. SoftBank led gains, climbing 18.44%, as semiconductor stocks also performed well, indicating a bullish trend in the market.

india_trends.title: RBI clears Kotak Bank to raise stake up to 9.99% in AU Small Finance, Federal Bank

india_trends.title: Bagmane Prime Office REIT IPO Day 3: Issue subscribed 3.48x so far. Check GMP, issue details.
india_trends.summary: Bagmane Prime Office REIT, backed by Blackstone, opened its IPO for subscription on May 5, concluding on May 7. The price band is set at ₹95-100 per unit, with a strong subscription status of 3.48x as of day 3.

india_trends.title: Tata Group, JSW to plow $1 billion in EV, battery tech
india_trends.summary: Indian giants Tata Group and JSW Group are investing close to $1 billion. They are building local capabilities in electric vehicle and battery technologies. This move aims to reduce dependence on Chinese tech. Tata's Agratas is spending over $400 million on battery research. JSW Motors plans to inve

india_trends.title: CarTrade Tech shares climb 17% to 2-month high after strong Q4 results
india_trends.summary: CarTrade Tech has seen a 17% stock surge, reaching a two-month high following strong Q4 and FY26 performance. The company reported a net profit of ₹70.85 crore, a 54% YoY increase, and achieved its highest annual revenue of ₹870 crore, reflecting robust growth.

india_trends.title: OnEMI Technology Solutions IPO listing in focus. Here's what GMP signals ahead of debut
india_trends.summary: OnEMI Technology Solutions IPO, which raised ₹900 crore, will debut on 8 May after strong demand with 9.5 times overall subscription. The issue included a fresh equity offering of ₹850 crore and an offer-for-sale of ₹76 crore. Grey market premium indicates a strong listing price expectation.
